description: A storefront designer needs a mock-up of a 3D 'OPEN' sign. Clear the scene of the 'BaseCube' and create a 3D text object with the content 'OPEN' positioned at the world origin (0,0,0). The text should have an extrusion of 0.15m, a bevel depth of 0.02m, and a bevel resolution of 3. Apply a metallic gold material with a Metallic value of 1.0, Roughness between 0.2 and 0.4, and a base color of approximately R=0.8, G=0.55, B=0.1. Render the scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_render.png and save the project file to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/sign_scene.blend.
